evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying Monthly Plan Signup Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the latest active/trial subscription is for the cheapest monthly plan under $40 that supports at least 3 chatbots and includes conversation analytics.

evaluators.name: Store Support Bot From Correct E-commerce Template Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether a chatbot named 'Store Support Bot' was created in English with the correct greeting using the first active template labeled for both Customer Support and E-commerce.

evaluators.name: Three FAQ Entries for Shipping, Returns, and Orders Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether exactly three FAQ articles were added to a single chatbot's knowledge base covering shipping time, return policy, and order status with appropriate categories.

evaluators.name: Chat Widget Appearance Customization Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether any existing chatbot's widget appearance was saved with accent color #1A73E8, position bottom-right, and header title 'Need help with your order?'.

evaluators.name: Weekday Sales Hours Routing Rule Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether there is a business-hours routing rule for weekdays 09:00–17:00 that routes to the Sales team (pre-sales and pricing) during hours and otherwise leaves chats to the bot only, with the rule enabled and correctly named.

evaluators.name: Lead Capture Form with Name, Email, Company Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether lead capture is enabled for a chatbot with a form that asks for Full Name (required), then Email (required), then Company (optional) in that order.

evaluators.name: Previous Month Top Average Messages Day Analytics Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user filtered conversation analytics to the previous full calendar month for all chatbots and opened the detailed view for the day with the highest average messages per conversation.

evaluators.name: Invite Admin and Editor and Assign Collaborator Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether Alex Admin and Emma Editor were invited with admin and editor roles respectively, and whether Emma (editor) was assigned as a collaborator on any existing chatbot.
